title: Small Learning and Development Company
excerpt:

posts.author: MeganG1401 (Megan Gutierrez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We’re a small learning and development company and we’d really like to run everything through Monday - from marketing and sales pipelines, to employee recruitment (contract based right now), and of course all our projects.

Thing is, we’re small and don’t know Monday as well as we’d like. We need the power of the automations to get it up and running so we can focus on the front end of things and not spend so much time figuring out the reporting and manual stuff that we know Monday can do.

We’re scaling faster than we expected and we need the infrastructure in place - yesterday.

Looking for an expert to come and help us!

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml:
@MeganG1401, we can help. Let’s meet on Zoom to go over the details. Book a time of us here https://connex.digital/book/monday

Talk soon!

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MeganG1401

Easy Mondays can help you out - we’re a small team doing big things like you.

Let us know if you want to chat.

teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We at Cinapsys specialize in helping businesses like yours maximize monday.com for efficiency and scalability. As a Platinum Partner, we can streamline your marketing, sales, recruitment, and project workflows with powerful automations—so you can focus on growth instead of manual work.

Let’s set up a quick call to understand your needs and get you up and running ASAP. Here is a link with my calendar Calendly

posts.author: KayaW (Kaya Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MeganG1401! Kaya here from Kick Consulting.
We are an Australian based monday.com experts and a Silver Partner, and I would like to invite you to have a chat about your needs and how we support your monday.com optimisation.
You can book here for a complimentary discovery call to see if we align.

Hope to see you soon!
